creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
If you try to build x11-fonts/terminus-font with all options set it will fail, because some patch will fail


Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|--- ./ter-u28b.bdf.orig	2011-05-15 15:24:05.000000000 +0300
|+++ ./ter-u28b.bdf	2011-05-15 15:24:07.000000000 +0300
--------------------------
Patching file ter-u28b.bdf using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 18210 (offset 1371 lines).
Hunk #2 succeeded at 17712 with fuzz 1 (offset 868 lines).
patch: **** misordered hunks! output would be garbled
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-fonts/terminus-font.
*** Error code 1


If you unselect HI2 (Higher uppercase letters, for size 18) option, then problem is gone
